textByHash.1baad73923e2101cf48c160c70b044575e53769d: No, I don't know many idiots. Except for young Ben there.
textByHash.29df69b62aee2cfee4da35563b03c75bf4c1df90: Nay, but the barkeep hears most of the news around here. Perhaps ye should be asking him for a quest.
textByHash.3663697f8790beb44d55a16876f23121694b9001: Nay, I've nothing for ye to do. But I hear there's an old landlubber in Draynor Village who's always a-looking for a lively lass to do him a favour.
textByHash.51a7c19580af6e3c010eff4d2d4de5a56aca12fe: Nay, but the barkeep hears most of the news around here. Or Redbeard Frank, he's often spoken of buried treasure. Perhaps ye should be asking them for quests.
textByHash.57142503578aba0baad36039f54f2fcddf518dd2: Aye, just like ye and yer leg, Ahab? [laugh][laugh]!
textByHash.7cc8c7ee0fbdc96d61a2e345da3e2b47c9c32297: Arrr, who are ye calling old?
textByHash.90661ed24a54d601f9a51f1922346eb214d79439: Nay, but Redbeard Frank has often spoken of buried treasure. Perhaps ye should be asking him for a quest.
textByHash.92cf2441cd381590b70f528b6d38f0e4d824f256: Well that all depends on the nature of yer travels!
textByHash.983b755a0b2ca23828b83c172c21d777270fd948: Redbeard Frank ye say? He be outside. Says he likes the feel of the wind on his cheeks.
textByHash.9a36d08b84a33b02814175fb28c24da0d1ebeb77: What ye be gettin' at, Ahab?
textByHash.9eb2c14685096b772980e95533b3ce78464dbcd2: Aye! I've sailed many a treacherous journey in my time! What it be to ye?
textByHash.a1f87116e489f39a33576e697880cee74b0d0251: The museum aye? Ye be diggin' up bones and them sorts then?
textByHash.a4d3e4be721cc815e433e30dc4722e8bbc4b4152: Arrr! Magical potions? Be soundin' like nonsense to me!
textByHash.aa452d54f53dc0bead37c8bc4dde5526a54e6227: Aye, 'tis a matter we take very seriously. Luckily, there are ways ye can avoid a curse.
textByHash.b4db3a0d28148f3bb7555170b442347ca59a4e5a: Then the way I be seein' it, ye be needin' a lucky charm to do with that!
textByHash.c614302b1fcaf2119452f28ad781196a06d353ec: Arrr, keep yeself away from that accursed place if ye values yer skin!
textByHash.c654d3e5863a88f93209b4f144fe7f7b9acb68a6: I be a pirate, not a scurvy schoolmaster!
textByHash.c69e07eadd5da5cf299eae6347cc00d01ba7be6f: Be off with ye then, and talk to them navigators! You're ruinin' me rum!
textByHash.c777c60c723525889c160ed4682ce85ce3054a50: Aye! I hear folk talking of an odd old man up in the quarry near Paterdomus who sounds as if he might deal in those sorts of things.
textByHash.f74c2345671143bfa4b70c908f0b78a6a9f6ff46: Nay, I've nothing for ye to do. But I hear there's an old landlubber in Draynor Village who's always a-looking for a lively lad to do him a favour.
